comment: /* Match schedule */ added commas both for grammatical clarity and to reduce the stream-of-consciousness effect. Also tweaked wording to reduce repetition.
Removed source since the same information is covered in the subsequent source and also made a minor change.
/* Qualification */ Changed number of CAF teams to reflect Egypt's qualification
/* Qualification */ tweaked wording to reduce repetition (unnecessarily saying exactly the same words twice in one sentence).

/* Draw */ Correction to text stating Canada would play the second match and the United States the third. This is incorrect, as the official FIFA match schedule (Reference 1) states both Group A matches (Mexico's group) will play on 11 June, with Canada and USA playing the next day in the third and fourth scheduled matches (by match date).
/* Match ball */  I add image of a photo of the ball
/* Qualification */ Mention that Uzbekistan was part of the Soviet Union and plays for the first time as an independent country.
There is already a link to the 2022 World Cup, so changed the sentence slightly so that a link to the 2018 World Cup could be added as well.
/* Qualification */ Explain that Uzbekistan was the 3rd independent post soviet nation to do so.
/* Qualification */ First UEFA nation to qualify - Norway
Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1316305786|1316305786]] by [[Special:Contributions/DrF Master7|DrF Master7]] ([[User talk:DrF Master7|talk]]) No... wait. They didn't yet. My mistake.
reverted [[WP:GOODFAITH]] hidden edits by Stanley20124, that are incorrect. Norway hasn't qualified, and we don't add things here for "nearly qualified"

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1316467743|1316467743]] by [[Special:Contributions/Stanley20124|Stanley20124]] ([[User talk:Stanley20124|talk]]) Even if hidden, this is still [[WP:CRYSTAL]]. We do not add teams to these lists until they have qualified.

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1316490403|1316490403]] by [[Special:Contributions/Enricoashton|Enricoashton]] ([[User talk:Enricoashton|talk]]) It's preferable to link to a redirect than to use a piped link. See [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] and [[MOS:NOPIPE]]
Added {{nowrap}} so that the headers of each group do not wrap to a second line.
Realigned tables so that it's easier to view on a mobile device.
/* Non-host city pre-tournament training base camp (Canada) */Cleanup section, including adding links for sources.
/* Draw */ host nations according to their groups.
/* Draw */ hiding draw pot table; this should not be visible until the draw pots are announced per [[WP:CRYSTAL]]
Best to list countries in alphabetical order.
Not all base camps are located near the host cities.
Just a brief description of the other leagues' schedules affected will suffice.

Reverted [[WP:AGF|good faith]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Stanley20124|Stanley20124]] ([[User talk:Stanley20124|talk]]): Teams that fail to qualify don't need to be listed, regardless of their previous success.
/* Draw */ draw seeding/procedure has not been officially confirmed by fifa
Added source date and minor edit.
/* Alberni Valley, Canada */ removed redundancy ("also ... as well"—they mean the same thing). Also no need to repeat "official" over and over again.
/* Teams */ Mention that the previous host also qualified.
Better location for source and minor change.
Proper name doesn't need to appear twice in the same sentence
/* Qualification */ Mention that Qatar directly qualified to the tournamenet for the first time.
/* Qualification */ Mention the high Arab participation
/* Qualification */ Clarify the Arab teams better
Cabo Verde is smaller than Trinidad and Tobago.
/* Qualification */ "For the first time" necessarily implies "in history." No need for the redundant puffery.
/* United States immigration enforcement */ Fix the title

Removing [[:c:File:MetLifeStadiumNYNJ.jpg|MetLifeStadiumNYNJ.jpg]]; it has been deleted from Commons by [[:c:User:Túrelio|Túrelio]] because: Uploaded by a user with a history of uploading stolen content and appears to be stolen from: https://aviewfrommyse
Listed cities alphabetically to match source and added citation.
/* Qualification */Removed the invisible note because no more teams can qualify from CAF unless it's through the playoffs.

Paragraph was becoming too long, so converted some of the text into footnotes {{efn}}. Also added wikilinks to three of the teams and removed part of a sentence that is not stated in the source provided.
Removed footnote as it is now included as part of footnote in the '''Teams''' section.
/* Team base camps */  it's their training facility
Corrected number of venues that were part of bid, changed numbers to digits to be consistent throughout section, and removed clarification needed tag.
Add: work, date, authors 1-1. Removed parameters. Some additions/deletions were parameter name changes. | [[:en:WP:UCB|Use this bot]]. [[:en:WP:DBUG|Report bugs]]. | Suggested by Jay8g | #UCB_toolbar
